identity.title: Who they are
identity.description: Basic information that makes it easy to recognize the character in the novel.

appearance.title: How they look
appearance.description: Static appearance written for prose: build, face, details, way of dressing.

character.title: What they are like
character.description: Temperament, disposition and tastes — what makes this character themselves.

drive.title: What drives them
drive.description: Desires, fears and worldview; a secret that fuels subtext.

expression.title: How they speak and move
expression.description: Way of speaking, plus body language and how they move.

roots.title: Roots
roots.description: Origin, family and past that shaped the character.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: What the character knows, doesn't know and wrongly believes — for continuity.

seed.title: Character seed
seed.description: Describe in one sentence who this character is. The AI will expand it into a full portrait.
seed.placeholder: e.g. a bitter lighthouse keeper, once an opera singer

messages.needSecondCharacter: Add at least a second character so the AI can create a relation.

characters.loadError: Unable to load the character builder.

header.title: Characters
header.subtitle: Profiles, relations, memories and reference images for the novel.
header.aiCharacterTitle: Create a full text character profile with AI without an image
header.aiCharacterAriaLabel: Create a full character profile with AI

editor.rolePlaceholder: Define the narrative role and the key tension.

relations.emptyNoCharacterDescription: Save the character to add relations.
relations.title: Relations
relations.aiActionTitle: Generate a relation draft with AI
relations.aiActionTitleDisabled: Add a second character to generate a relation
relations.emptyDescription: This character has no saved relations yet.

memories.emptyNoCharacterDescription: Save the character to add memories.
memories.title: Memories
memories.aiActionTitle: Generate a memory draft with AI
memories.emptyDescription: This character has no saved memories yet.

image.emptyNoCharacterDescription: Save the character to generate an image.
image.promptPlaceholder: The image prompt will be built from the character profile and book context.

aiActions.addTitleDisabled: The field is already in the context or there is no active prompt.
aiActions.addTitle: Add the field to the prompt context.

promptContext.queuedReason: The "{{label}}" field is already in the AI queue.

relationModal.advancedDescription: Helper fields — they don't go into scene-writing prompts.

memoryModal.advancedDescription: Details don't go into scene-writing prompts.
